queued.title: Harden options_regime contract for live options sleeve (Phase 2)
queued.what: Agent-06 and Agent-07 currently default to IV_ELEVATED when options_regime is missing or invalid (TICKET-018 conservative default). When the options sleeve activates in Phase 2, this default must become a hard fail with code MISSING_CONTRACT_INPUT: options_regime. Update both prompts: remove the IV_ELEVATED fallback, enforce hard fail on missing/invalid field, and remove the 'options sleeve inactive' conditional comment. Do not make this change before the options sleeve is live — silent defaulting is safer than hard failing in paper-only mode.
queued.blocker: Options sleeve not yet active. Do not harden until Phase 2 options trading is enabled.
queued.prereq: 60-day paper gate passed. Options sleeve enabled in risk_policy.json. Agent-06 and Agent-07 prompts updated to v1.3+.

queued.title: Agent-04 Reddit Pipeline v2
queued.what: Upgrade Agent-04 from public search scraping to proper Reddit OAuth API with structured feature extraction. Treat Reddit as a narrative pressure sensor, not a signal engine. Design alongside Q-005 (ApeWisdom) and Q-006 (Stocktwits) as a unified retail sentiment layer — not three independent data pulls.
queued.priority_features: mention acceleration, cross-subreddit propagation, narrative classification (squeeze/earnings/YOLO), authenticity score
queued.blocker: 60-day paper gate not yet reached. Do not build before proven execution stack.
queued.prereq: Reddit developer app (self-serve OAuth via reddit.com/prefs/apps — script type). Data API enterprise application was rejected as unnecessary; PRAW OAuth is the correct approach for read-only subreddit monitoring.

queued.title: ApeWisdom integration — retail sentiment layer
queued.what: Integrate ApeWisdom free API into the intelligence layer. Returns ticker mention counts, rank, and 24h trend direction across WSB and finance subreddits. No auth required. Evaluate whether this replaces or supplements the full Reddit PRAW build in Q-004. Agent integration: feed mention rank and acceleration into Agent-04 or a new Agent-04b as a pre-processed retail sentiment signal. Must align with existing signal hierarchy — corroborating input only, never a standalone trade trigger. Cross-reference against Agent-01 (news), Agent-05 (technical), and options flow before any weight is assigned.
queued.prereq: None — public API, no key required. Endpoint: https://apewisdom.io/api/v1.0/filter/all-stocks/

queued.title: Stocktwits integration — finance-specific sentiment feed
queued.what: Integrate Stocktwits public API for per-ticker sentiment and message volume. Better signal-to-noise than Reddit for individual tickers since the platform is finance-only. Free, no key required for public endpoints. Agent integration: feed bullish/bearish ratio and message volume spikes into the intelligence layer alongside ApeWisdom (Q-005). Design the combined sentiment layer so Agent-04 can weight Reddit narrative (squeeze/macro), Stocktwits momentum (ticker-level), and ApeWisdom rank (retail crowd direction) as a unified retail sentiment score — not three independent signals. Must not override options flow, news, or technical analysis.
queued.prereq: None — public API. Review Stocktwits API docs for rate limits before building.

queued.title: Profit path — trading system product
queued.what: Offer a managed paper→live trading service, signal subscription, or white-labeled pipeline to other traders. Highest upside but significant regulatory surface — must research RIA registration requirements, determine whether signal distribution constitutes investment advice under SEC rules, and draft appropriate disclaimers. Do not build or market this before: (a) 60-day paper gate passed with clean results, (b) LLC formed (Q-007), (c) legal review completed. Strategy: start as a signal transparency product (show the thesis, not a buy recommendation), build track record publicly, consult a securities attorney before any paid offering. Fund with Q-008 or Q-009 first.
queued.blocker: 60-day paper gate not yet passed. Legal review required before any public offering.
queued.prereq: LLC formed (Q-007). Clean paper trading track record. Securities attorney consultation. RIA registration research.

queued.title: Form LLC
queued.what: Form a single-member LLC to operate all business activities under. Unlocks deductibility of LLM subscriptions (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.), hardware (new machine, Section 179), software tools, internet, home office, and education. You do not need revenue to form — you need to be operating in pursuit of profit, which you are. File with Florida Secretary of State, get an EIN from the IRS (free, online, 10 min), open a dedicated business checking account. Total cost: ~$125 filing + $138.75/year annual report.
queued.prereq: Florida: file at sunbiz.org ($125 filing fee, $138.75/year annual report). No state income tax — LLC profits pass through to personal return only. Get EIN at IRS.gov (free, 10 min). Open dedicated business checking account after EIN is issued. Consult a CPA before first tax filing.

queued.title: Tax & accounting setup checklist
queued.what: Set up the financial infrastructure to support the LLC properly and protect deductions. Key steps: (1) Open dedicated business checking — never mix personal and business money, this is non-negotiable. (2) Set up expense tracking — Wave (free) or QuickBooks Simple Start. Save every API invoice, hardware receipt, and subscription confirmation to a dedicated folder. (3) Understand Schedule C — single-member LLC files taxes on Schedule C attached to personal 1040, no separate business return required. Florida has no state income tax so no state business return either. (4) Document pursuit of profit — keep a simple log of hours worked, goals, and business activities. Protects against IRS hobby classification. (5) Section 179 for hardware — new machine can be fully expensed in year one rather than depreciated. (6) Find a CPA before first tax filing — not before forming the LLC, but before filing. Early year losses (pre-revenue) can be carried forward to offset future income, but only if IRS agrees it's a business. CPA helps document intent. Deductible categories: LLM API subscriptions, hardware, software tools, internet (business %), home office (dedicated space %), education, domain/hosting.
queued.prereq: LLC formed (Q-007). Dedicated business bank account opened.

queued.title: YouTube / content + tools
queued.what: Document the build publicly. 'I built a 16-agent AI trading pipeline' is genuinely interesting content with a real audience. Monetizes through AdSense, sponsorships, and naturally leads to selling templates, prompt packs, or the OpenClaw setup as a product. Lowest regulatory risk, lowest startup cost, builds audience before you have anything to sell — audience is the asset. Strategy: start with build-log style videos (what you built, why, what broke), layer in tutorials as the system matures, eventually gate advanced content or tools behind a paid tier.
queued.prereq: LLC formed (Q-007). Basic recording setup. Decide on channel identity and branding.

queued.title: AI automation consulting / agency
queued.what: Sell the skillset, not a product. You know how to build multi-agent systems with real infrastructure — most businesses don't have anyone who can do this. One retainer client at $3-5k/month covers all subscriptions and hardware. Services: custom agent pipelines, OpenClaw-style automation setups, AI workflow integration for small businesses. No product needed to start — just a landing page, a LinkedIn presence, and one warm outreach campaign. Strategy: close 1-2 clients to fund the hobby side, keep scope tight, productize repeatable work into templates over time.
queued.prereq: LLC formed (Q-007). Simple contract template. Define service scope and pricing before first outreach.

completed.title: OpenClaw → Claude Code live bridge via ACP (persistent channel binding)
completed.what: Bound Claude Code (Sonnet 4.6) directly to Claude-Claw Telegram topic via ACP persistent channel binding. Verified: topic responds as Claude, not the OpenClaw harness. Binding survives gateway restart. OpenClaw main agent remains on gpt-5.4.

completed.title: Fix encoding artifacts in all agent prompts
completed.what: Cleaned double-encoded UTF-8 mojibake from all 14 affected agent prompts — em dashes, apostrophes, and emoji sequences all corrected. Zero artifacts remaining across all 17 prompt files.

completed.title: Formalize options_regime contract for Agent-06 and Agent-07
completed.what: Declared options_regime as explicit contract input in both prompts. Defined valid values (IV_LOW | IV_ELEVATED | IV_HIGH | IV_EXTREME). Conservative IV_ELEVATED default for Phase 1; hard fail path documented for Phase 2 options sleeve activation (tracked in Q-012).

completed.title: Formalize Agent-12 live_trading_enabled contract input
completed.what: Declared live_trading_enabled as explicit required contract input in Agent-12. Added MISSING_POLICY_FIELD fail code — no silent default. Added hard gate comment: true = live broker orders, false = paper only.

completed.title: Stale Signal Guard
completed.what: Agent-11 v1.2 + order_submitter.py: mandatory re-evaluation at live price when >60 min late. Hard block at >3h unless stale_signal_max_hours in risk_policy.json.

completed.title: Verify trade journal + KPI aggregator (2026-03-06)
completed.what: Confirmed all 4 delayed fills captured (AVGO, MRVL, NVDA, MU). Fixed UTC date bug in trade_journal.py — was using UTC date, now uses ET date via ZoneInfo.
